name: IT managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 SaaS subscriptions/month tool
description: For IT managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 subscriptions/month, manual tracking causes missed renewals. We automate notifications and payments instead of manual tracking.
target_audience: IT managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 SaaS subscriptions/month
problem_solved: Managing multiple SaaS subscription renewals and payments
